fair_value_today.basis: base case (Metis) intrinsic value — the anchor, not a weighted blend

fair_value_12m.basis: #1 rolled forward at r=9.0% less dividend 0.0

detail.multiple_rationale: 28x P/E on FY2027E $3.60 EPS ($3.00 FY2026E growing 20% as ad EBIT approaches $1B and subscription EBIT margin expands to 33%+). Justified multiple range: subscription alone at 22x EBIT = $87.85/sh base (27x current P/E); advertising at scale adds re-rate potential. 28x is the multiple the market will pay once $3B FY2026 ad revenue is in results and the trajectory toward $5B+ is visible. Peers: Amazon at 45x FY2027E EPS, Apple at 30x — Netflix at 28x is the conservative end of what a subscription+growing-ads platform commands. NOT the consensus 33-35x (implies full $9B ad scenario), NOT the current 27x (prices zero advertising premium). The re-rate from 27x to 28x is minimal and requires only that the $3B FY2026 ad guidance is delivered — contracted by management.

street_reconstruction.what_price_implies: At 27.9x NTM FCF (FY2026 guided), the current price implies a ~8.5% FCF CAGR for 10y (then 4% terminal) at r=9.3%.
street_reconstruction.what_street_implies: The street mean target implies ~13.0% for 10y.
street_reconstruction.history_anchor: Netflix FCF CAGR 2022-2025: from $1.6B (FY2022) to $9.5B (FY2025) = approximately 82%/year absolute growth — driven by margin expansion from 17.8% to 29.5%. This is not a steady-state CAGR; it reflects operating leverage kicking in. On revenue: 16%/year CAGR FY2022-2025. The FCF CAGR is misleading as a forward guide — the right anchor is the FY2026 guided $12.5B growing toward ~$18B by FY2028.
street_reconstruction.contested_lever: Whether advertising ARPU per ad-tier subscriber scales from ~$15-20/year today toward $40-55/year by 2028-2030 — i.e., can Netflix's in-house ad tech achieve the fill rates and CPMs that justify a 15-18x EBIT multiple on the advertising segment's $6.5B in 2028 earnings contribution, or does Amazon's structural data advantage cap Netflix's ad yield and compress the platform re-rate?

conviction.label: MEDIUM
conviction.basis: action BUY: Daedalus assigned MEDIUM (evidence read across base/bull/bear) -> MEDIUM

bridge_logic: #1 fair value today 87.79 -> #3 fair value 12m 95.69 (x(1+0.090) - div 0.0); #4 target 12m 100.8 (defensible_multiple); implied return to #4 = 25.2%, to #3 = 18.9%, to street mean 114.15 = 41.8%
